primary_text:
$800 to $1,300 saved per year. That is what Best for Pet members keep in their pocket.

Here is how: unlimited vet consults at $0 each (normally $130 to $150). All vaccinations included. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 VetChat.

All for $50/month. At your local vet.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess, no pre-existing condition traps.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: $800+ saved per year. Here is how.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. Not insurance.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Big savings number as hero. Breakdown underneath. Green/warm tones. Trustworthy.
